scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin,frontend -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w packages/admin" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/admin && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/api && npm run lint -w packages/admin && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/api && npm run typecheck -w packages/admin && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
